name: Easy Turkey Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Press leftover stuffing or mix into a 9-inch pie plate or quiche dish to form crust.
2. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes.
3. Combine meat and cheese in another bowl.
4. Beat eggs, evaporated milk, and pepper together.
5. Sprinkle the meat and cheese mixture on top of the baked crust.
6. Pour the egg and milk mixture over the top layer.
7. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes at 350°F until the center is set.
8. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
9. Garnish with tomato wedges.
Serves 6.
